_**Agent (copilot/auto)**_

Likely root cause: `activeTab` in the Pinia store is not typed/initialized with `'stacks'`, so clicking that tab appears to do nothing.

Apply this fix in the store and in `stack.vue` typing.

````ts
// filepath: c:\Work\MIT\portals\mmm\sipvts-app\app\stores\stack.ts
// ...existing code...

export type StackTab = 'table' | 'matrix' | 'stacks'

export const useStackStore = defineStore('stack', {
  state: () => ({
    // ...existing state...
    activeTab: 'table' as StackTab,
  }),
  actions: {
    // ...existing actions...
    reset() {
      // ...existing reset logic...
      this.activeTab = 'table'
    },
    search() {
      // ...existing search logic...
      // do NOT force matrix/table after search unless intended
      // this.activeTab = 'table'
    }
  }
})

// ...existing code...
````

````vue
// filepath: c:\Work\MIT\portals\mmm\sipvts-app\app\pages\stack.vue
<script setup lang="ts">
// ...existing code...
import { useStackStore, SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES, type StackTab } from '../stores/stack'

const store = useStackStore()

function setActiveTab(id: StackTab) {
  store.activeTab = id
}

const tabs: { id: StackTab; label: string }[] = [
  { id: 'table', label: '📋 Рейтинг' },
  { id: 'matrix', label: '🗂 Матрица Jaccard' },
  { id: 'stacks', label: '🧩 Стеки' }
]
// ...existing code...
</script>
````

If it still shows blank, the next check is that `store.result.stacks` is not empty and `StackStackCards` is resolvable (component name/path).
